chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2570 of 2023 (SAMI Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd. Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.12354/2023 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.08.2024 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for Custom. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the purpose of this petition has been served and he has been instructed not to press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
